precedents.name: Norway Government Pension Fund Global
precedents.drawdown_rule: 4% fiscal rule — only real return drawn
precedents.key_lesson: Perpetual mandate with strict drawdown rule preserves principal indefinitely. Corpus grew 825× in 34 years. Applicable to VidNova Trust endowment reserve channel.

precedents.name: Ireland Strategic Investment Fund
precedents.drawdown_rule: Double Bottom Line mandate — economic and social return required
precedents.key_lesson: First-loss co-investment model achieves 1:3.5 leverage on directed capital. Every EUR 1 of Trust capital mobilises EUR 3.50 of private investment. Direct structural model for VidNova equity channel.

precedents.name: Marshall Plan (ERP)
precedents.drawdown_rule: Four-year grant programme; counterpart funds reinvested locally
precedents.key_lesson: Speed and scale of grant deployment critical — 98% committed in 4 years. Conditionality (OEEC cooperation) drove institutional reform alongside reconstruction. Benchmark for VidNova grants channel scale.

precedents.name: Kosovo Reconstruction Programme
precedents.portfolio_split: 60% EU grants · 25% bilateral · 15% World Bank loans
precedents.drawdown_rule: UNMIK trust fund — donor pledges drawn against verified milestones
precedents.key_lesson: Multi-donor trust fund with single implementing entity prevents duplication. Milestone-based drawdown reduces absorption risk. Applicable to VidNova governance structure for donor coordination.

precedents.name: G7 ERA Extraordinary Revenue Acceleration
precedents.portfolio_split: 100% loan backed by frozen Russian asset interest (~$3B/yr)
precedents.drawdown_rule: Loan repaid from windfall interest on ~$280B frozen Russian sovereign assets
precedents.key_lesson: Direct legal precedent for collateralising Trust capitalisation against frozen Russian assets. ERA loan interest (~$3B/yr) demonstrably available and legally defensible. Establishes the capital formation path for VidNova Scenario A.
